instruction:
Repair the disturbed scenic SVG: steampunk sky port.

Patch:
- remove sv_027-extra-survey-marker
- download-sv_027-line-002.stroke: "#8b5cf6" -> "#5a1812"
- download-sv_027-circle-001.cx: 835.0 -> 800
- download-sv_027-ellipse-007.stroke-width: 7.0 -> 3
- download-sv_027-circle-002.opacity: 0.41 -> 0.9
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1600 1000">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="sky07" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#3a4a7a" />
      <stop offset="0.4" stop-color="#9a6a8a" />
      <stop offset="0.7" stop-color="#e0986a" />
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#f6c98a" />
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="sun07" cx="0.5" cy="0.5" r="0.5">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#fff3d8" /><stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#ffd49a" stop-opacity="0.7" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#ffd49a" stop-opacity="0" />
    </radialGradient>
    <linearGradient id="balloon07a" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#c0392b" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#7a201a" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="balloon07b" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#2e7a6a" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#1a4a40" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="brass07" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#e8c878" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#9a7a32" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="cloud07" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#ffe8cc" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#e8b894" />
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="cloudblur07" x="-40%" y="-40%" width="180%" height="180%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="14" /></filter>
  </defs>

  <rect width="1600" height="1000" fill="url(#sky07)" id="download-sv_027-rect-001" />
  <circle cx="835" cy="360" r="360" fill="url(#sun07)" id="download-sv_027-circle-001" />
  <circle cx="800" cy="360" r="90" fill="#fff6e0" opacity="0.41" id="download-sv_027-circle-002" />

  </g>
